description: Just Eat Takeaway.com operates online food ordering and delivery services and provides partner integrations for logistics, order management, POS connectivity, and related platform operations. Its public developer materials describe APIs for business partners and consumer applications.
summary: just-eat.io exposes one documented HTTP API surface at `https://uk.api.just-eat.io` with a published OpenAPI YAML and partner-issued auth via API key, basic auth, bearer JWT, or JET Connect/Flyt API key; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
